steps.title: Add the equations to eliminate 8(y - 11)
steps.content:
Adding the two equations eliminates the $8(y - 11)$ terms (they have opposite signs):
$$\frac{x}{3} + 8(y - 11) = 32$$
$$\frac{x}{5} - 8(y - 11) = 40$$
Adding yields:
$$\frac{x}{3} + \frac{x}{5} = 72$$

steps.title: Solve for 8x
steps.content:
Combine fractions on the left with common denominator 15:
$$\frac{5x + 3x}{15} = 72$$
$$\frac{8x}{15} = 72$$
Multiply both sides by 15:
$$8x = 1080$$
